# Stella UI — Full AI Reference

Stella UI is a React component library (`@stella-ds/react` v0.2.0) built on a celestial design token system (`@stella-ds/theme`). Design tokens are exposed as CSS custom properties (`--stella-*`) covering color, typography, spacing, border radius, shadow, and transitions. Components use CSS Modules and consume those variables; they follow Radix UI primitives for accessibility.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @stella-ds/react @stella-ds/theme
# or
pnpm add @stella-ds/react @stella-ds/theme
```

## Setup

### Option 1 — CSS import (recommended for bundlers)

```tsx
import '@stella-ds/theme/css';
```

### Option 2 — Runtime injection

```ts
import { injectCSSVars } from '@stella-ds/theme';
injectCSSVars();
```

### Option 3 — Manual CSS variables string (SSR / build pipelines)

```ts
import { generateCSSVarsString } from '@stella-ds/theme';
const cssBlock = generateCSSVarsString(); // returns `:root { --stella-... }` string
```

---

## Design Token Reference

All custom properties live in `:root` under the `--stella-` prefix. Consume them in CSS Modules:

```css
color: var(--stella-color-cosmos-500);
```

### Color Tokens

Color palettes use a celestial naming convention. Each palette has scale steps (100–900) unless noted.

| Palette | Semantic role | Example variable |
|---------|---------------|-----------------|
| `cosmos` | Primary / interactive (indigo) | `--stella-color-cosmos-500` |
| `nebula` | Accent (purple) | `--stella-color-nebula-500` |
| `aurora` | Accent (cyan) | `--stella-color-aurora-500` |
| `nova` | Success / positive (emerald) | `--stella-color-nova-500` |
| `void` | Backgrounds | `--stella-color-void-base`, `--stella-color-void-surface`, `--stella-color-void-overlay`, `--stella-color-void-muted` |
| `starlight` | Text | `--stella-color-starlight-primary`, `--stella-color-starlight-secondary`, `--stella-color-starlight-disabled` |

Typical usage patterns:

```css
/* Interactive element */
background-color: var(--stella-color-cosmos-500);
background-color: var(--stella-color-cosmos-600); /* hover */

/* Page background */
background-color: var(--stella-color-void-base);

/* Card surface */
background-color: var(--stella-color-void-surface);

/* Body text */
color: var(--stella-color-starlight-primary);

/* Secondary / muted text */
color: var(--stella-color-starlight-secondary);

/* Success state */
color: var(--stella-color-nova-500);
```

### Typography Tokens

```css
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-xs);    /* 0.75rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-sm);    /* 0.875rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-md);    /* 1rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-lg);    /* 1.125rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-xl);    /* 1.25rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-2xl);   /* 1.5rem */
font-size: var(--stella-font-size-3xl);   /* 1.875rem */

font-weight: var(--stella-font-weight-normal);   /* 400 */
font-weight: var(--stella-font-weight-medium);   /* 500 */
font-weight: var(--stella-font-weight-semibold); /* 600 */
font-weight: var(--stella-font-weight-bold);     /* 700 */

line-height: var(--stella-line-height-tight);
line-height: var(--stella-line-height-normal);
line-height: var(--stella-line-height-relaxed);
```

### Spacing Tokens

```css
/* Scale: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 6 | 8 | 12 | 16 */
padding: var(--stella-spacing-4);    /* 1rem */
gap: var(--stella-spacing-6);        /* 1.5rem */
margin: var(--stella-spacing-8);     /* 2rem */
```

### Border Radius Tokens

```css
border-radius: var(--stella-border-radius-sm);   /* small */
border-radius: var(--stella-border-radius-md);   /* medium */
border-radius: var(--stella-border-radius-lg);   /* large */
border-radius: var(--stella-border-radius-full); /* pill / circle */
```

### Shadow Tokens

```css
box-shadow: var(--stella-shadow-sm);
box-shadow: var(--stella-shadow-md);
box-shadow: var(--stella-shadow-lg);
box-shadow: var(--stella-shadow-xl);
```

### Transition Tokens

```css
transition: color var(--stella-transition-default);
transition: background-color var(--stella-transition-fast);
transition: transform var(--stella-transition-slow);
```

---

## Components

### Alert

Inline feedback banner for status messages. Use `onClose` to make the alert dismissible.

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'info' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'info'` | Visual/semantic style |
| onClose | `() => void` | — | Callback; renders a close button when provided |

**All variants:**

```tsx
<Alert variant="info">
  <AlertTitle>Info</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Informational message.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>

<Alert variant="success" onClose={() => setVisible(false)}>
  <AlertTitle>Success</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your changes have been saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>

<Alert variant="warning">
  <AlertTitle>Warning</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Please review before continuing.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>

<Alert variant="error">
  <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Something went wrong. Try again.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

**Compound structure:** `Alert` wraps `AlertTitle` (bold heading) and `AlertDescription` (body text). Both are optional but recommended for screen reader clarity.

---

### Avatar

Round user avatar with automatic fallback to initials when no image is provided or image fails to load.

```tsx
import { Avatar } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| alt | `string` | required | Accessible label for the avatar |
| src | `string` | — | Image URL |
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` | Avatar dimensions |
| fallback | `string` | — | Text (initials) shown when no image |

**All sizes:**

```tsx
<Avatar alt="Alice" fallback="AL" size="xs" />
<Avatar alt="Alice" fallback="AL" size="sm" />
<Avatar alt="Alice" fallback="AL" size="md" />
<Avatar alt="Alice" src="/alice.jpg" size="lg" />
<Avatar alt="Alice" src="/alice.jpg" size="xl" />
```

**With image + fallback (image fails to load → shows initials):**

```tsx
<Avatar alt="Bob Smith" src="https://example.com/bob.jpg" fallback="BS" size="md" />
```

---

### Background

Full-bleed animated visual background, typically used as a page or hero background.

```tsx
import { Background } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'stars' \| 'galaxy' \| 'milkyway' \| 'gradient' \| 'solid'` | `'stars'` | Animation/visual style |
| color | `'cosmos' \| 'nebula' \| 'aurora' \| 'mixed'` | `'cosmos'` | Color scheme |
| theme | `'dark' \| 'light'` | `'dark'` | Background brightness |
| twinkle | `boolean` | `true` | Enables star twinkle animation |
| ribbons | `number` | — | Number of ribbon/aurora elements |
| tokenColor | `string` | — | Override with a specific CSS token color |
| showGradient | `boolean` | — | Overlay a gradient wash |

**Examples:**

```tsx
{/* Default starfield */}
<Background variant="stars" color="cosmos" theme="dark" twinkle />

{/* Galaxy with aurora accents */}
<Background variant="galaxy" color="aurora" theme="dark" twinkle />

{/* Milky way, light mode */}
<Background variant="milkyway" color="nebula" theme="light" />

{/* Pure gradient */}
<Background variant="gradient" color="mixed" showGradient />

{/* Solid backdrop */}
<Background variant="solid" color="cosmos" theme="dark" />

{/* Ribbons (aurora borealis effect) */}
<Background variant="galaxy" color="aurora" ribbons={5} theme="dark" />
```

---

### Badge

Small inline label for status, categories, or counts.

```tsx
import { Badge } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'solid' \| 'outline' \| 'subtle'` | `'solid'` | Visual fill style |
| color | `'default' \| 'primary' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'default'` | Semantic color |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md'` | `'md'` | Badge size |

**All combinations:**

```tsx
{/* Variants */}
<Badge variant="solid" color="primary">Primary</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline" color="primary">Primary</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" color="primary">Primary</Badge>

{/* Semantic colors */}
<Badge variant="subtle" color="default">Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" color="primary">Primary</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" color="success">Success</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" color="warning">Warning</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" color="error">Error</Badge>

{/* Sizes */}
<Badge size="sm">Small</Badge>
<Badge size="md">Medium</Badge>
```

---

### Breadcrumb

Navigation trail showing hierarchical location. All sub-components are required to build a valid breadcrumb.

```tsx
import {
  Breadcrumb,
  BreadcrumbList,
  BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink,
  BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (BreadcrumbLink) | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element (e.g. Next.js `<Link>`) |
| isCurrentPage | `boolean` | `false` | Marks current page; adds `aria-current="page"` |

**Standard usage:**

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink>
    </BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbLink href="/products">Products</BreadcrumbLink>
    </BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem>
      <BreadcrumbLink isCurrentPage>Widget Pro</BreadcrumbLink>
    </BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

**With Next.js Link (asChild):**

```tsx
import Link from 'next/link';

<BreadcrumbLink asChild>
  <Link href="/products">Products</Link>
</BreadcrumbLink>
```

---

### Button

Primary interactive element. Supports four visual variants, three sizes, a loading state, and the `asChild` pattern for polymorphic rendering.

```tsx
import { Button } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'solid' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'glow'` | `'solid'` | Visual style |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Button size |
| loading | `boolean` | `false` | Shows spinner; sets `aria-busy` and `aria-disabled` |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Merges props onto child element (Radix Slot) |

**All variants:**

```tsx
<Button variant="solid">Solid</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
<Button variant="glow">Glow</Button>
```

**Sizes:**

```tsx
<Button size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button size="md">Medium</Button>
<Button size="lg">Large</Button>
```

**Loading state:**

```tsx
<Button variant="solid" loading>Saving…</Button>
```

**As a link (asChild with Next.js):**

```tsx
import Link from 'next/link';
<Button asChild variant="outline">
  <Link href="/dashboard">Dashboard</Link>
</Button>
```

---

### Card

Structured content container with optional hover effect. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription,
  CardContent, CardFooter,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Card) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------|------|---------|-------------|
| hoverable | `boolean` | `false` | Adds elevation + translateY on hover |

**Full compound usage:**

```tsx
<Card hoverable>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Component Library</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Build UIs faster with Stella UI components.</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
    <Text>Main content goes here.</Text>
  </CardContent>
  <CardFooter>
    <Button size="sm">Learn more</Button>
  </CardFooter>
</Card>
```

**Minimal (content only):**

```tsx
<Card>
  <CardContent>Simple card content.</CardContent>
</Card>
```

---

### Checkbox

Accessible checkbox built on Radix UI Checkbox, with optional label and error state.

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Checkbox dimensions |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Label rendered beside the checkbox |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Applies error ring and sets `aria-invalid` |

**Sizes and states:**

```tsx
<Checkbox size="sm" label="Small checkbox" />
<Checkbox size="md" label="Medium checkbox" defaultChecked />
<Checkbox size="lg" label="Large checkbox" />
<Checkbox size="md" label="Required field" error />
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [checked, setChecked] = useState(false);
<Checkbox
  size="md"
  label="Subscribe to newsletter"
  checked={checked}
  onCheckedChange={setChecked}
/>
```

---

### Dialog

Modal dialog built on Radix UI Dialog. Handles focus trapping, escape key, and overlay click to dismiss.

```tsx
import {
  Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader,
  DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription,
  DialogClose, DialogOverlay,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (DialogContent) | Type | Default | Description |
|----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| showClose | `boolean` | `true` | Show the built-in × close button |

**Standard dialog:**

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="solid">Open Dialog</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Confirm Action</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>
        This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
      </DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <DialogClose asChild>
        <Button variant="ghost">Cancel</Button>
      </DialogClose>
      <Button variant="solid">Confirm</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

**Without built-in close button:**

```tsx
<DialogContent showClose={false}>
  {/* You manage closing yourself */}
</DialogContent>
```

**Controlled (programmatic open/close):**

```tsx
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
<Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogTitle>Controlled Dialog</DialogTitle>
    <Button onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Close</Button>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

---

### Footer

Site footer layout. Compound component with named slots.

```tsx
import { Footer, FooterContent, FooterDivider, FooterBottom } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Sub-component | Description |
|---------------|-------------|
| `Footer` | Root footer element |
| `FooterContent` | Main content area (links, columns) |
| `FooterDivider` | Horizontal rule between content and bottom |
| `FooterBottom` | Bottom bar for copyright, legal links |

```tsx
<Footer>
  <FooterContent>
    <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="8">
      <Stack gap="2">
        <Text weight="semibold">Product</Text>
        <Text as="span" color="secondary">Features</Text>
        <Text as="span" color="secondary">Pricing</Text>
      </Stack>
      <Stack gap="2">
        <Text weight="semibold">Company</Text>
        <Text as="span" color="secondary">About</Text>
        <Text as="span" color="secondary">Blog</Text>
      </Stack>
    </Stack>
  </FooterContent>
  <FooterDivider />
  <FooterBottom>
    <Text size="sm" color="secondary">© 2025 Stella UI. All rights reserved.</Text>
  </FooterBottom>
</Footer>
```

---

### Header

Site header / top navigation. Compound component.

```tsx
import { Header, HeaderBrand, HeaderNav, HeaderActions } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Header) | Type | Default | Description |
|---------------|------|---------|-------------|
| sticky | `boolean` | `false` | `position: sticky; top: 0` |
| blur | `boolean` | `false` | Backdrop blur on scroll |
| mobileNav | `ReactNode` | — | Content injected for mobile navigation |

```tsx
<Header sticky blur>
  <HeaderBrand>
    <Heading level={1} size="md">Stella UI</Heading>
  </HeaderBrand>
  <HeaderNav>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Docs</Button>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Components</Button>
  </HeaderNav>
  <HeaderActions>
    <Button variant="solid" size="sm">Get Started</Button>
  </HeaderActions>
</Header>
```

---

### Heading

Semantic HTML heading (`h1`–`h6`) with decoupled visual size.

```tsx
import { Heading } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| level | `1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5 \| 6` | `2` | Rendered heading element |
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| '2xl' \| '3xl'` | `'md'` | Visual font size |
| weight | `'normal' \| 'medium' \| 'semibold' \| 'bold'` | `'bold'` | Font weight |
| align | `'left' \| 'center' \| 'right'` | `'left'` | Text alignment |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

**All visual sizes:**

```tsx
<Heading level={1} size="3xl">Display Heading</Heading>
<Heading level={2} size="2xl">Page Title</Heading>
<Heading level={2} size="xl">Section Title</Heading>
<Heading level={3} size="lg">Subsection</Heading>
<Heading level={3} size="md">Card Title</Heading>
<Heading level={4} size="sm">Small Heading</Heading>
<Heading level={5} size="xs">Tiny Heading</Heading>
```

**Weights and alignment:**

```tsx
<Heading level={2} size="xl" weight="normal" align="center">
  Centered Normal Weight
</Heading>

<Heading level={2} size="xl" weight="semibold" align="right">
  Right-aligned Semibold
</Heading>
```

---

### Input

Text input with size and error variants.

```tsx
import { Input } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Input height / font size |
| error | `boolean \| string` | `false` | `true` applies error styles; a string also renders an error message |

**All sizes:**

```tsx
<Input size="sm" placeholder="Small input" />
<Input size="md" placeholder="Medium input" />
<Input size="lg" placeholder="Large input" />
```

**Error states:**

```tsx
{/* Visual error only */}
<Input size="md" error placeholder="Invalid value" />

{/* Error with message (aria-describedby linked automatically) */}
<Input size="md" error="Email address is required" placeholder="Email" />
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [value, setValue] = useState('');
<Input
  size="md"
  value={value}
  onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
  placeholder="Type here"
/>
```

---

### PageGrid

CSS grid layout for page-level composition.

```tsx
import { PageGrid } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| layout | `'single' \| 'sidebar-left' \| 'sidebar-right' \| 'three-col'` | `'single'` | Grid template |
| gap | `'4' \| '6' \| '8' \| '12'` | `'6'` | Column/row gap |
| fullBleed | `boolean` | `false` | Removes horizontal padding |

**Layout examples:**

```tsx
{/* Single column */}
<PageGrid layout="single" gap="6">
  <main>Content</main>
</PageGrid>

{/* Sidebar left */}
<PageGrid layout="sidebar-left" gap="8">
  <aside>Navigation</aside>
  <main>Content</main>
</PageGrid>

{/* Sidebar right */}
<PageGrid layout="sidebar-right" gap="8">
  <main>Content</main>
  <aside>Table of contents</aside>
</PageGrid>

{/* Three columns */}
<PageGrid layout="three-col" gap="6">
  <aside>Left</aside>
  <main>Center</main>
  <aside>Right</aside>
</PageGrid>
```

---

### Radio

Accessible radio group. Compound component built on Radix UI.

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioItem } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (RadioGroup) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Radio button size |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Error state styling |
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'vertical'` | Layout direction |

| Prop (RadioItem) | Type | Default | Description |
|------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| value | `string` | required | Radio value |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Rendered label |

**Vertical (default):**

```tsx
<RadioGroup defaultValue="b" orientation="vertical">
  <RadioItem value="a" label="Option A" />
  <RadioItem value="b" label="Option B" />
  <RadioItem value="c" label="Option C" />
</RadioGroup>
```

**Horizontal:**

```tsx
<RadioGroup orientation="horizontal" size="sm">
  <RadioItem value="yes" label="Yes" />
  <RadioItem value="no" label="No" />
</RadioGroup>
```

**Error state:**

```tsx
<RadioGroup error>
  <RadioItem value="a" label="Choice A" />
  <RadioItem value="b" label="Choice B" />
</RadioGroup>
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [value, setValue] = useState('a');
<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <RadioItem value="a" label="Option A" />
  <RadioItem value="b" label="Option B" />
</RadioGroup>
```

---

### Section

Semantic `<section>` wrapper for page layout.

```tsx
import { Section } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'full'` | `'md'` | Max-width constraint |
| padding | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'none'` | `'md'` | Vertical padding |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

```tsx
{/* Default */}
<Section>Content</Section>

{/* Full-width hero with large padding */}
<Section size="full" padding="lg">
  <Background variant="stars" color="cosmos" theme="dark" />
  <Heading level={1} size="3xl">Welcome</Heading>
</Section>

{/* Narrow content section */}
<Section size="sm" padding="sm">
  <Text>Short content block.</Text>
</Section>

{/* No vertical padding */}
<Section padding="none">
  <Separator />
</Section>
```

---

### Select

Dropdown select built on Radix UI Select. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem,
  SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (SelectTrigger) | Type | Default | Description |
|----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Trigger size |
| error | `boolean \| string` | `false` | Error state; string renders message |
| placeholder | `string` | — | Placeholder text when no value selected |

**Basic usage:**

```tsx
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger size="md" placeholder="Select a color" />
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="red">Red</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="green">Green</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="blue">Blue</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

**With groups and separators:**

```tsx
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger placeholder="Select framework" />
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectGroup>
      <SelectLabel>React</SelectLabel>
      <SelectItem value="next">Next.js</SelectItem>
      <SelectItem value="remix">Remix</SelectItem>
    </SelectGroup>
    <SelectSeparator />
    <SelectGroup>
      <SelectLabel>Vue</SelectLabel>
      <SelectItem value="nuxt">Nuxt</SelectItem>
    </SelectGroup>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

**Error state:**

```tsx
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger error="Please select an option" placeholder="Required" />
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">A</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [value, setValue] = useState('');
<Select value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <SelectTrigger placeholder="Pick one" />
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">B</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

---

### Separator

Visual divider line.

```tsx
import { Separator } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'horizontal'` | Line direction |
| decorative | `boolean` | `true` | When `true`, hidden from assistive tech (`role="none"`) |

```tsx
{/* Horizontal divider between sections */}
<Separator orientation="horizontal" />

{/* Vertical divider in a toolbar */}
<Stack direction="horizontal" align="center" gap="2">
  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Cut</Button>
  <Separator orientation="vertical" decorative />
  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Copy</Button>
  <Separator orientation="vertical" decorative />
  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Paste</Button>
</Stack>

{/* Semantic separator (announced by screen readers) */}
<Separator decorative={false} />
```

---

### Skeleton

Loading placeholder that mimics content shape while data loads.

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'text' \| 'circular' \| 'rectangular'` | `'text'` | Shape of the placeholder |
| width | `string \| number` | — | Width (CSS value or px number) |
| height | `string \| number` | — | Height (CSS value or px number) |
| lines | `number` | — | For `variant="text"`: number of lines |
| animate | `boolean` | `true` | Enable pulse animation |

**Text (multi-line):**

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={3} />
```

**Avatar placeholder:**

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="circular" width={48} height={48} />
```

**Image/card placeholder:**

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="rectangular" width="100%" height={200} />
```

**No animation:**

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={2} animate={false} />
```

**Skeleton card pattern:**

```tsx
<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="3" align="center">
      <Skeleton variant="circular" width={40} height={40} />
      <Stack gap="1">
        <Skeleton variant="text" width={120} />
        <Skeleton variant="text" width={80} />
      </Stack>
    </Stack>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
    <Skeleton variant="text" lines={4} />
  </CardContent>
</Card>
```

---

### Stack

Flexbox layout primitive for arranging children vertically or horizontally.

```tsx
import { Stack } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| direction | `'vertical' \| 'horizontal'` | `'vertical'` | Flex direction |
| gap | `'1' \| '2' \| '3' \| '4' \| '6' \| '8' \| '12' \| '16'` | `'4'` | Space between children |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'stretch'` | `'stretch'` | `align-items` |
| justify | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'between' \| 'around'` | `'start'` | `justify-content` |
| wrap | `boolean` | `false` | `flex-wrap: wrap` |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

**Vertical stack (default):**

```tsx
<Stack gap="4">
  <Input placeholder="First name" />
  <Input placeholder="Last name" />
  <Button>Submit</Button>
</Stack>
```

**Horizontal row:**

```tsx
<Stack direction="horizontal" gap="3" align="center" justify="between">
  <Text weight="semibold">Plan</Text>
  <Badge variant="subtle" color="primary">Pro</Badge>
</Stack>
```

**Centered content:**

```tsx
<Stack direction="vertical" align="center" justify="center" gap="6">
  <Heading level={2} size="2xl">Welcome</Heading>
  <Text color="secondary">Get started below.</Text>
  <Button variant="solid" size="lg">Sign Up</Button>
</Stack>
```

**Wrapping tag cloud:**

```tsx
<Stack direction="horizontal" gap="2" wrap>
  {tags.map(tag => <Badge key={tag}>{tag}</Badge>)}
</Stack>
```

---

### Switch

Toggle switch for boolean settings.

```tsx
import { Switch } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Switch dimensions |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Accessible label |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Error state styling |

**Sizes:**

```tsx
<Switch size="sm" label="Small toggle" />
<Switch size="md" label="Medium toggle" defaultChecked />
<Switch size="lg" label="Large toggle" />
```

**Error state:**

```tsx
<Switch size="md" label="Must agree to terms" error />
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [enabled, setEnabled] = useState(false);
<Switch
  size="md"
  label="Dark mode"
  checked={enabled}
  onCheckedChange={setEnabled}
/>
```

---

### Tabs

Tab navigation with two visual styles. Compound component built on Radix UI Tabs.

```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Tabs) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'line' \| 'solid'` | `'line'` | Underline style vs filled pill |

**Line variant:**

```tsx
<Tabs variant="line" defaultValue="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="analytics">Analytics</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="overview">Overview content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="analytics">Analytics content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="settings">Settings content</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

**Solid variant:**

```tsx
<Tabs variant="solid" defaultValue="monthly">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="monthly">Monthly</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="yearly">Yearly</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="monthly">Monthly pricing</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="yearly">Yearly pricing (save 20%)</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

**Controlled:**

```tsx
const [tab, setTab] = useState('a');
<Tabs value={tab} onValueChange={setTab}>
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="a">A</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="b">B</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="a">A</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="b">B</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

---

### Text

Body text element with flexible sizing, weight, color, and element rendering.

```tsx
import { Text } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Font size |
| weight | `'normal' \| 'medium' \| 'semibold' \| 'bold'` | `'normal'` | Font weight |
| color | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'disabled'` | `'primary'` | Maps to starlight token |
| align | `'left' \| 'center' \| 'right'` | `'left'` | Text alignment |
| as | `'p' \| 'span' \| 'div' \| 'label'` | `'p'` | Rendered HTML element |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |
| truncate | `boolean` | `false` | Single-line overflow ellipsis |

**Sizes and weights:**

```tsx
<Text size="lg" weight="bold">Large bold</Text>
<Text size="md" weight="semibold">Medium semibold</Text>
<Text size="sm" weight="medium">Small medium</Text>
<Text size="xs" color="secondary">Extra small secondary</Text>
```

**Semantic elements:**

```tsx
<Text as="span" size="sm" color="secondary">Inline label</Text>
<Text as="label" size="sm" weight="medium">Form label</Text>
<Text as="div" size="md">Block container text</Text>
```

**Truncation:**

```tsx
<Text truncate style={{ maxWidth: 200 }}>
  This text will be truncated with an ellipsis when it overflows.
</Text>
```

---

### Toast

Notification toasts for transient feedback. Compound component built on Radix UI Toast.

```tsx
import {
  ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast,
  ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, ToastAction,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Toast) | Type | Default | Description |
|--------------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'info' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'info'` | Semantic color |

| Prop (ToastClose) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | `string` | — | Accessible label for the close button |

**Setup (wrap app in provider):**

```tsx
// _app.tsx or root layout
<ToastProvider>
  {children}
  <ToastViewport />
</ToastProvider>
```

**All variants:**

```tsx
<Toast variant="info">
  <ToastTitle>Info</ToastTitle>
  <ToastDescription>Here is some information.</ToastDescription>
  <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
</Toast>

<Toast variant="success">
  <ToastTitle>Saved!</ToastTitle>
  <ToastDescription>Your changes have been saved successfully.</ToastDescription>
  <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
</Toast>

<Toast variant="warning">
  <ToastTitle>Heads up</ToastTitle>
  <ToastDescription>This action may have side effects.</ToastDescription>
  <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
</Toast>

<Toast variant="error">
  <ToastTitle>Error</ToastTitle>
  <ToastDescription>Something went wrong. Please try again.</ToastDescription>
  <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
</Toast>
```

**With action button:**

```tsx
<Toast variant="info">
  <ToastTitle>New update available</ToastTitle>
  <ToastDescription>Refresh to get the latest version.</ToastDescription>
  <ToastAction altText="Refresh page">
    <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={() => window.location.reload()}>
      Refresh
    </Button>
  </ToastAction>
  <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
</Toast>
```

---

### Tooltip

Contextual tooltip on hover/focus. Compound component built on Radix UI Tooltip.

```tsx
import {
  TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent,
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (TooltipContent) | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| side | `'top' \| 'right' \| 'bottom' \| 'left'` | `'top'` | Preferred placement side |
| sideOffset | `number` | — | Distance in px from trigger |

**Setup (wrap app in provider once):**

```tsx
<TooltipProvider>
  {children}
</TooltipProvider>
```

**All sides:**

```tsx
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Top</Button></TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="top" sideOffset={4}>Tooltip on top</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>

<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Right</Button></TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="right" sideOffset={4}>Tooltip on right</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>

<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Bottom</Button></TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="bottom" sideOffset={4}>Tooltip on bottom</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>

<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Left</Button></TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="left" sideOffset={4}>Tooltip on left</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

**On an icon button:**

```tsx
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" aria-label="Settings">
      <SettingsIcon aria-hidden="true" />
    </Button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent side="bottom" sideOffset={6}>Settings</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

---

## Accessibility Notes

- `:focus-visible` is used for all focus rings (never `:focus`)
- `aria-invalid` is set on `Input`, `Checkbox`, `Switch`, `RadioGroup` in error state
- `aria-busy` + `aria-disabled` are set on `Button` when `loading={true}`
- `aria-hidden="true"` is set on loading spinners and decorative SVGs
- `aria-current="page"` is set on `BreadcrumbLink` when `isCurrentPage` is true
- `aria-describedby` links `Input` error messages using `React.useId()`
- `Separator` with `decorative={true}` renders as `role="none"` (default)

## asChild Pattern

Several components accept `asChild` (powered by `@radix-ui/react-slot`). This merges Stella UI's props and styles onto the direct child element:

```tsx
// Render a Button as a Next.js Link
<Button asChild variant="solid">
  <Link href="/dashboard">Dashboard</Link>
</Button>

// Render a Heading as an h1 via asChild
<Heading level={2} size="xl" asChild>
  <h1>Actual H1</h1>
</Heading>
```
